name: 0272-r8-github_project_v2_source_candidate_durable_consumer
commit_subject: consume approved projectv2 candidates into sql
summary: Reuse the existing SQL context-store builder and 0260 binding to durably consume approved r7 ProjectV2 SourceCandidate gate records with readback, immutable collision refusal and idempotent replay while keeping OpenVINO, Qdrant, GitHub mutation, Scheduler and SHM closed.
